sections.paragraph:
Original: רפשׂ

Transliteration: râphaś

Phonetic: raw-fas'

BDB Definition:

  1. to stamp, tread, foul by stamping or treading
    1. (Qal) to tread down, foul by treading, foul with the feet
    2. (Niphal) to be fouled

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2199

Part(s) of speech: Verb
